name: Calpol / Dolo 650
source_note: Data compiled for Arogya knowledge base. Verify against 1mg.com and pharmeasy.in for live updates.
how_it_works: Inhibits prostaglandin synthesis in the CNS and peripherally blocks pain impulse generation. Exact antipyretic mechanism involves endocannabinoid system modulation.

serious: Hepatotoxicity (overdose or with chronic alcohol use)

food_interactions: Alcohol with regular paracetamol causes severe liver damage
Do not exceed 4g/day total from ALL sources
what_to_avoid: Maximum 4 grams per day — check ALL products for hidden paracetamol
Do not give adult doses to children
